# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources: |
  - name: vpc_network
    type: deploymentmanager.v1.project.project
    properties:
      networkName: "my-gcp-project"   # provide your project id/name if it's not default one in GCP    
      
  - name: subnets
    type: 'vpc_subnetworks.create'
    properties: |
        config:
          autoCreateSubnetworks: true
          vpcId: "my-gcp-project"   # provide your project id/name if it's not default one in GCP    
          subnetworkNamePrefix: 'subnet'  # set the name prefix for created resources. It is recommended to give a meaningful and unique value here so that you can easily find them back after their creation or reuse they elsewhere as needed     
        locationMaskBitsSize: "26"
